cnbc.title: Seniors in Medicare are about to get landmark obesity drug coverage — but many may not know it yet
cnbc.summary: Many seniors may be unaware of the landmark coverage shift starting on July 1, with limited advertising seen from the government or Eli Lilly and Novo.

cnbc.title: If you think China needs to dethrone U.S. dollar, you don't understand how it is waging global currency war
cnbc.summary: It's misguided to focus on China's renminbi replacing the U.S. dollar. Beijing is already successfully reducing dependence on a dollar-centric global system.

cnbc.title: A 'perfect storm' points to a much smaller U.S. auto market by 2040
cnbc.summary: The auto industry is selling fewer cars--one forecaster says this is a fundamental change, and it is going to get worse.

cnbc.title: America can't get enough of protein. The dairy industry can't keep up
cnbc.summary: Demand for whey protein is off the charts as American diet trends change and GLP-1s boom, and the dairy industry is struggling to produce enough.

cnbc.title: IRAs hold trillions more than 401(k) plans — yet people hardly save in them
cnbc.summary: Investors are increasingly rolling money from 401(k) plans to IRAs. Some observers fear they're exposed to poor investment advice.

cnbc.title: Some renters say homeownership isn't part of their American Dream: Renting is 'really freeing for me'
cnbc.summary: Some no longer see renting as a temporary stop on the path to homeownership but rather a long-term lifestyle choice, reflecting a shift in the American Dream.

cnbc.title: The memory shortage shaking Apple and Microsoft is 'existential crisis' for smaller players
cnbc.summary: While Apple and Microsoft raise prices on key devices to help cover the soaring costs of memory, smaller consumer electronics companies are in dire straits.

cnbc.title: ‘Heated Rivalry’ fuels a boom in gay romance stories, with women leading the fandom
cnbc.summary: ‘Heated Rivalry’ has helped gay romance stories gain mainstream attention, with women driving much of the fandom.

cnbc.title: From protein coffee to CBD soda: How brands are cashing in on the functional beverage boom
cnbc.summary: "We're selling [almost] as much protein cold foam as we do flat whites," Starbuck's EMEA Manager of Beverage Development Sam Henderson told CNBC.
